## Submission checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The repository has been active within the past 12 months
- [ ] The repository has a README with usage examples
- [ ] This is not a general HTTP client or SDK generator
- [ ] There is no existing entry for this repo in the list
- [ ] The entry is placed alphabetically within the correct section
- [ ] The description is one sentence, ends with a period, and contains no marketing language

## Entry being added

```
- [repo-name](https://github.com/owner/repo) `Language` – Description.
```
